textPlain: A little strange to write up a bug hunt that was resolved by the ffi upstream already, and not by the hunt itself. OP didn't fix the bug, though identifying that the upgrade was relevant is of some interest. Writing could have been clearer.

LLM slop. Why do people (presumably) take the time to debug something like this, do tests and go to great lengths, but are too lazy to do a little manual writeup? Maybe the hour saved makes up for being associated with publishing AI slop under your own name? Like there is no way the author would have written a text that reads more convoluted than what we have here.
I don’t get it. Also it reads llmish

There is no clear writing because there is no clear thinking, which is par for Rubyists.Not only was this post written by LLM, it feels as if the debugging process here was just iteratively copy/pasting into an LLM and tagging along for the ride, wherever the hell it goes.
